boundaries.input: canonical skills, generated commands, agents, packs, hooks, runtime contracts

boundaries.output: validation, evidence, CI and release decisions

boundaries.input: authoritative JSON, JS, and workflow sources
exact ref, isolated identity, credentials when authorized

packageScripts.name: check
packageScripts.command: npm run test:coverage:check && npm run validate:maintainer:evidence

packageScripts.name: check:compatibility
packageScripts.command: npm run validate:compatibility-evidence && npm run validate:second-product && npm run validate:portable-paths

packageScripts.name: check:docs
packageScripts.command: npm run validate:docs && npm run validate:community

packageScripts.name: check:release
packageScripts.command: npm run test:coverage:check && npm run validate:maintainer:evidence && node scripts/validate-plugin-install.mjs --dry-run

packageScripts.name: check:runtime
packageScripts.command: npm run validate:runtime && npm run validate:hook-truth

packageScripts.name: check:security
packageScripts.command: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:shell && npm run lint:actions && npm run validate:github-workflows && npm run scan:secrets

packageScripts.name: check:truth
packageScripts.command: npm run validate:release-truth && npm run validate:hook-truth && npm run validate:project-state && npm run validate:facts && npm run validate:drift

packageScripts.name: ci:quick
packageScripts.command: node scripts/validate-schemas.mjs && node scripts/lint-frontmatter.mjs && node scripts/validate-docs.mjs && node scripts/validate-hooks.mjs

packageScripts.name: lint
packageScripts.command: node scripts/lint-frontmatter.mjs && node scripts/validate-docs.mjs && npm run typecheck

packageScripts.name: test
packageScripts.command: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e

validationTasks.label: validate Claude compatibility
validationTasks.skippedPattern: skipping live claude plugin validate checks

validationTasks.label: validate real-task benchmark plan and report

deferredProductLanes.summary: Requires at least two independently maintained production plugin specifications and demonstrated release pressure.
Generated Markdown catalogs remain sufficient until public demand and an approved hosting model exist.
Capability packs remain documentation and routing guidance, not dynamically loaded runtime modules.
Domain variation remains in packs and consumer profiles unless repeated evidence proves new workflow surfaces are necessary.
